home.heroTitle: Hämäränkävijät opens a doorway into Finnish mythology.
home.heroBody: Hämäränkävijät is a roleplaying game where stories are built together. This website helps parents, educators, players, and partners quickly understand what the game is and how to start.

audienceItems.title: Parents
audienceItems.body: A practical summary of roleplaying games, why they are fun, and what children can learn from them.

audienceItems.title: Players and followers
audienceItems.body: Behind-the-scenes notes about design principles, development updates, and future releases.

audienceItems.title: Organizations
audienceItems.body: A concise overview of partnership options for educational or cultural projects.

audienceItems.title: Publishers
audienceItems.body: A quick way to evaluate the game's voice, audience, and publishing potential.

home.newsletterBody: Subscribe for development notes, playtest calls, and release updates.

parents.heroTitle: Why roleplaying works for children and families
parents.heroBody: Roleplaying supports communication, problem-solving, and creative expression. Hämäränkävijät offers a safe way to explore Finnish mythology together.

audienceItems.title: Collaboration
audienceItems.body: Players solve situations together and learn to listen to each other.

audienceItems.title: Language and expression
audienceItems.body: Building stories strengthens vocabulary, imagination, and verbal confidence.

audienceItems.title: Cultural literacy
audienceItems.body: Mythological characters and places become meaningful through active play.

parents.startBody: Starting only needs one game leader, a small group, basic rules, and dice. The core is shared storytelling.

about.heroBody: Hämäränkävijät was created to make Finnish mythology feel playable, human, and accessible for different age groups.

audienceItems.title: Clarity first
audienceItems.body: Rules should support stories, not bury them.

audienceItems.title: Cultural grounding
audienceItems.body: Themes draw from Finnish folklore without gatekeeping.

audienceItems.title: Flexible depth
audienceItems.body: The same foundation can support family play and deeper campaigns.

about.journalBody: The journal shares current progress, playtest lessons, and next milestones.

organizations.heroBody: Hämäränkävijät can support education, youth work, and cultural programming. Collaboration can start from a lightweight pilot.

audienceItems.title: Education pilots
audienceItems.body: Roleplaying used in language, history, or creative expression contexts.

audienceItems.title: Facilitated workshops
audienceItems.body: Guided sessions for educators, youth workers, or hobby groups.

audienceItems.title: Custom scenarios
audienceItems.body: Tailored content for specific learning or cultural goals.

organizations.contactBody: Share your goal, participant group, and timeline, and I will propose a suitable format.

publishers.heroBody: Hämäränkävijät combines a distinct cultural identity with approachable play. The project is suitable for phased publishing growth.

audienceItems.title: Clear audience
audienceItems.body: Families, hobby players, and education-focused groups seeking story-led tabletop play.

audienceItems.title: Distinct theme
audienceItems.body: Finnish mythology offers a clear voice in the broader RPG landscape.

audienceItems.title: Expandable line
audienceItems.body: The core game can expand into adventures, supplements, and guide material.

publishers.contactBody: I can provide a pitch summary, playtest insights, and draft publication roadmap.

contact.heroBody: You can use the form below or email directly. I welcome partnership and publishing conversations.
contact.formBody: Submit the form below. Replace the form action with your own Formspree endpoint before launch.

blog.heroBody: Updates from playtesting, worldbuilding, and release planning.
